Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • compartment_id - (Required) (Updatable) The compartment identifier.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource. Each key is predefined and scoped to a namespace. For example: {"foo-namespace": {"bar-key": "value"}}
  • description - (Optional) (Updatable) A short description of the project.
  • display_name - (Optional) (Updatable) A user-friendly display name for the resource that can be changed.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) A simple key-value pair applied without any predefined name, type, or scope. It exists for cross-compatibility only. For example: {"bar-key": "value"}
